context: The response should exercise the release-notes skill behavior for drafting changelogs from merged PRs or a git range.

checklist.name: gathers_source_changes
checklist.description: Explains that the skill should gather merged PRs, commits, or an explicit git range before drafting notes.

checklist.name: uses_required_sections
checklist.description: Includes or preserves sections for Highlights, Changes, Fixes, Internal / Harness, and Upgrade notes.

checklist.name: classifies_harness_work
checklist.description: Correctly places Dark Factory, verifier, workflow, registry, eval, or skill-distribution changes under internal/harness content rather than user-facing product claims.

checklist.name: avoids_unsupported_claims
checklist.description: States that release notes should be evidence-backed and should not invent features, fixes, or upgrade guidance not supported by the PRs or git range.

checklist.name: flags_upgrade_notes
checklist.description: Mentions that breaking changes, new required secrets, workflow changes, registry version changes, or install/verification changes should be called out as upgrade notes when present.
